headline: Moderna (MRNA): 10 Best Performing S&P 500 Stocks So Far in 2026
summary: Moderna Inc. (NASDAQ:MRNA) is one of the best performing S&P 500 stocks so far in 2026. On April 21, the European Commission granted marketing authorization for mCOMBRIAX (mRNA-1083), making it the world’s first mRNA combination vaccine for influenza and COVID-19 to receive such approval. Authorized for adults aged 50 and older, the single-dose vaccine is […]
